prompt:
Use case: institutional product explainer for Nuoma WPP
Primary request: premium abstract overview of the Nuoma WPP platform as a single operating system for CRM, inbox, automations, campaigns and observability
Scene/background: dark cinematic product studio with floating architectural panels and soft volumetric depth, no real people, no logos
Subject: abstract luminous modules for CRM, automations, inbox, campaigns and observability converging into one central core
Action: modules emerge separately, align with precision, then lock into one central hub over eight seconds
Camera: slow dolly-in, 24mm, stable premium cinematic motion
Lighting/mood: controlled high-contrast tech lighting with soft glow and confident institutional tone
Color palette: petrol blue, graphite, cyan, amber
Style/format: cinematic product motion graphics, premium SaaS launch film, abstract interface design
Timing/beats: 0-2s modules appear, 2-5s modules align, 5-8s the central hub locks and breathes
Audio: subtle technological ambience, clear Brazilian Portuguese voiceover, no visible narrator, voice prioritized in the mix
Dialogue:
<dialogue>
- Narrador: "Nuoma WPP centraliza CRM, automacoes e operacao do WhatsApp Web em uma unica base."
</dialogue>
Constraints: no real people, no readable UI text, no literal WhatsApp interface, no logos, no watermark, no visible narrator
Avoid: flicker, jitter, malformed letters, chaotic motion, crowded composition
